notes: Round 1 summarizer case: preserve family pressure and weak authorship after routing-memory trim.
expected_checks: parental_pressure summary names the parents and medicine push
self_authorship summary stays mixed instead of fully owned

user_tag_summaries.parental_pressure: Gia dinh da ep em uu tien nganh on dinh, nhung muc do cu the chua ro.
user_tag_summaries.self_authorship: Em chua noi ro day la lua chon cua minh hay cua gia dinh.
user_tag_summaries.core_tension: An toan gia dinh va mong muon sang tao dang keo nguoc nhau.

routing_memory.content: Anh muon nghe ro hon ve luc keo chinh dang ep em phai chon duong nay la gi.
Bo me em cu nhac em phai hoc Y vi on dinh, em so lam ho that vong, nhung em lai thich thiet ke giao dien va muon tu lam san pham nho cua minh.
Neu bo me khong chen vao, em nghi minh se nghieng ve huong nao hon?
Moi khi em noi den design thi me em bao nghe do bhp benh, khong co tuong lai, roi nhac den ho hang lam bac si. Em thuong im luon de tranh cai va lai noi rang chac em se nghe theo.
Luc em noi se nghe theo, do la dong y that hay la cach de ket thuc ap luc?
Em khong biet nua, em biet em dang noi theo cho xong, vi em van mo video ve design moi ngay, nhung em cung thay co loi neu khong di theo con duong ma nha em muon.

notes: Round 1 summarizer case: keep deadline pressure and depletion separate but connected.
expected_checks: burnout_risk summary names sleep loss and overload
urgency summary names the near exam/application clock
reality_gap summary does not overclaim if the issue is mostly exhaustion

user_tag_summaries.burnout_risk: Da co dau hieu qua tai nhung chua neo ro vao nguon ap luc.
user_tag_summaries.urgency: Co suc ep thoi gian nhung chua tach ro deadline nao dang chi phoi.

routing_memory.content: Anh can biet em dang bi ep boi viec gi: thieu thoi gian, qua tai, hay ca hai.
Em dang hoc them toi khuya de kip thi tot nghiep va nop ho so hoc bong, dem nao cung ngu 3 den 4 tieng. Em thay dau dau, tim dap nhanh, va moi luc nghi den han nop la em lai cuon len.
Cam giac qua tai nay keo dai bao lau roi, va no dang lam em chon duong nghe nghiep theo kieu nao?
Khoang hon mot thang nay em chi nghi den cach qua duoc ky nay, em muon chon nhanh mot nganh nao nghe on dinh cho xong de con tap trung thi, chu em khong con suc ngoi nghi xem minh hop gi that.
Neu khong co cai moc thoi gian nay, cach em can nhac co khac di nhieu khong?
Chac chac la co, vi luc binh thuong em van muon tim ky hon, con bay gio em chi muon ket thuc cai guong quay nay va ngu mot giac cho xong. Em biet em dang quyet trong luc rat met.

notes: Round 1 summarizer case: preserve the specific avoided truth instead of only saying the student is vague.
expected_checks: avoidance summary names money and capability as dodged topics
compliance summary stays empty or weak if the student is not merely obedient

user_tag.avoidance_reasoning: Em thuong lai lai ne cau hoi ve kha nang thuc thi.
user_tag.vague_reasoning: Em hay noi chung chung ve dam me va tu do.

user_tag_summaries.avoidance: Em co xu huong ne nhung cau hoi buoc em phai no ro doi gia va nang luc.
user_tag_summaries.vague: Cau tra loi thuong day kha nhieu slogan nhung thieu chi tiet kiem chung.

routing_memory.content: Anh dang hoi vao mot diem rat cu the: em dinh song bang nghe nay trong 2 nam dau nhu the nao?
Em nghi chi can dam me du lon thi moi thu se tu mo ra, co khi troi se cho em co hoi. Em muon mot cuoc song tu do, sang tao, khong bi buoc vao khuon, con chi tiet thi de sau cung duoc.
Anh chua nghe em tra loi ve tien, ky nang hien tai, hay cach em song qua giai doan dau.
Tien bac em nghi roi se tinh sau, quan trong la dung danh mat lua. Em khong muon bi dong khung boi nhung con so va nhung cau hoi rat thuc dung luc nay, vi em so no giet chet cam hung.
Neu khong noi ro nang luc hien tai, em dang yeu cau ai tin vao dieu gi?
Em chi thay minh can giu niem tin va tiep tuc mo ve mot tuong lai lon hon, con nhung buoc thuc te em se tu xoay sau. Em khong muon dao sau vao nhung cho em chua san sang nhin thang.
